texto: I'm pretty sure my parents arepretending they are sick.I know because I taught them bothto do that little trick. You blow your nose and hold your headand claim your brain is breaking.And so, a pro like me would knowmy folks are clearly faking.A little thing I learned in schoolconvinced me I am right.My parents are supposed to meetmy principal tonight.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ted Scheu: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a educacao. O trecho “I'm pretty sure my parents arepretending they are sick.I know because I taught them bothto do tha…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, humour, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
